  • Classes in me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics used by me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api
    Class
    Description
    CosmeticRegistry
    Represents the registry for all StarCosmetics Cosmetics.
  • Classes in me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics used by me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics
    Class
    Description
    Cosmetic
    Parent Interface for Base Cosmetics, ready for material, particle, or entity implementations.
    CosmeticLocation
    Represents a specific entry for a cosmetic.
